issues.title: 调用工具流式输出会报空指针异常： Cannot invoke "java.time.Duration.plus(java.time.Duration)" because "evalDuration" is null
issues.body: **Bug description** 我本地启动了ollama，运行了qwen3:1.7b模型，打算在调用工具的时候流式输出内容，调用工具的时候，会报空指针异常的错误 **Environment** spring ai：1.0.0 ollama： 0.9.0 **Steps to reproduce** 请求代码如下： ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c9d21b4a-b6a6-41e8-9965-16f2979157f0) 截图如下：

comments.body: This issue was previously fixed by PR:https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3372, perhaps you can upgrade to version 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT first.

> This issue was previously fixed by PR:[#3372](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3372), perhaps you can upgrade to version 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT first.此问题之前已由 PR: [#3372](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3372) 修复，或许您可以先升级到版本 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT。

好的，谢谢
